subject: A muscular green-skinned Namekian warrior fires a sustained energy beam, body angled forward in a combat stance
suspected_ip: Saonel (Dragon Ball Super — Universe Survival Saga)
description: A muscular green-skinned humanoid with Namekian cranial features stands in a braced combat stance, upper body turned forward and arms extended as if channeling or firing an energy blast. The figure wears a dark outfit. A bright yellow-white energy beam or blast extends from the figure's direction toward the viewer or out of frame. Green and teal energy accents trail behind the figure. The background is a gradient of dark and electric colors, emphasizing the energy discharge. The composition is a mid-shot with strong diagonal motion through the energy beam. The mood is aggressive and concentrated.
foreground: muscular green Namekian in dark outfit, arms extended firing energy blast
background: dark energy field with electric-teal and yellow accents
emotion: fierce concentration — body braced, full force directed into the blast
